Creates a workspace proposal work item spawn application projector.

## Import

```ts
import { workspaceProposalWorkItemSpawnApplicationProjector } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions/work-item";
```

## Signature

```ts
function workspaceProposalWorkItemSpawnApplicationProjector(
	graph: Graph,
	opts: WorkspaceProposalWorkItemSpawnApplicationProjectorOptions<TInput>,
): WorkspaceProposalWorkItemSpawnApplicationProjectorBundle<TInput>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `graph` | `Graph` | Graph that owns the created nodes or projector. |
| `opts` | `WorkspaceProposalWorkItemSpawnApplicationProjectorOptions<TInput>` | Options that configure the helper. |

## Returns

A node bundle that emits the projected records.

## Example

```ts
import { workspaceProposalWorkItemSpawnApplicationProjector } from "@graphrefly/ts/solutions/work-item/scheduling";
```
